description: The L.O.L. Festival is a lively, family-friendly 3-day celebration that brings the whole City of Gulf Shores and the Gulf Coast together for a weekend of music, food, and local pride. Held at Waterway Village in Gulf Shores, AL, the festival showcases talented local musicians across multiple genres from folk, Americana, country, southern rock, blues, blues rock, alternative, funk, indie, progressive rock, to sound blend elements of heavy psych and experimental rock. The festival features scheduled performances throughout the weekend in a family-friendly atmosphere. The food truck area showcases a mouthwatering variety of dishes crafted by local chefs and family-owned vendors. Local businesses set up booths to share their products and services and connect with the community. The festival concludes with a headline performance by The Destinations, a Best of Baldwin 2026 winner, representing the best of the 70s and southern rock n' roll.

description: A unity ceremony is an artistic way to create a keepsake memento from special occasions. People select a color of glass to represent them. The colors are combined to symbolize unity. Two to four colors may be chosen to represent a marriage, renewal of vows, anniversary, blending of families, the birth of a child, or any other occasion that unites. The blended glass is returned to the gallery. The gallery artist combines the blended glass with base glass to fuse into a beautiful 12" round platter suitable for displaying or a centerpiece.
